content.en:
In fact, the 60,000 True Ancestors of the Nine Pole Legion is not a lot, but the legion pays attention to quality, not quantity.

Each of these 60,000 True Ancestors had the potential to be promoted to the top True Ancestor, so at a glance, you could see how terrifying these 60,000 True Ancestors were.

It can be said that the strength of the human race at the True Ancestor level is no weaker than those ordinary Upper Triple Heaven forces, but the Dao Ancestor level is still much weaker, but this takes time to accumulate, and it is not something that can be made up in a short time.

And the progress of Ye Tian's family is also incomparably great.

With the accumulation of a large number of resources, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue cultivated forbidden techniques to increase their strength a lot, and they also cultivated the Thousand Dao Techniques in one sect to the extreme level, and their strength reached the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor, and their combat power was comparable to that of the Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

If it is after a period of time, after stabilizing the realm, you can start to impact the Dao Ancestor level, once you break through to become a Dao Ancestor, you will definitely be able to become a Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and after a period of cultivation, you can be promoted to a sixth-or seven-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Xiao Yue's ascension was faster, and now she had broken through the realm, and she was already a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

And Ye Yu's strength improved a little slowly, and now he had just reached the Supreme True Ancestor Extreme.

Ye Tian's strength has also improved immensely, his forbidden Dao power has increased many times, and the progress of the Great Thousand Dao Technique is also very fast.

Now, all the Great Thousand Dao Techniques have been upgraded to the Dacheng realm, and some of them have been promoted to the consummation realm, such as the Ancient Slashing Technique, the Ancient Desolate Body, and the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step, the three Great Thousand Dao Techniques, which have been cultivated by Ye Tian to the consummation realm.

However, if you want to cultivate the Great Thousand Dao Technique to the extreme level, it will be more difficult, and it will take a long time to do it.

However, in terms of combat power, Ye Tian had now reached the extreme of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, even the original Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, and the Demon Demon Dao Ancestor were not his opponents.

After all, they are both the ultimate of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and their combat effectiveness is also strong and weak, which is the result of potential.

But in terms of combat power, Ye Tian felt that he was on par with the ghost boy, but if it was a long-term fight, he would be able to consume the ghost boy with his Dacheng-level forbidden body and the power of the forbidden origin.

"If I can comprehend a supreme Dao technique, I'm afraid my strength will have a earth-shaking transformation!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he won't try to create the Xetrogen Dao Technique for the time being, after all, his current Daqian Dao Technique has not yet been cultivated to the extreme level, and to create the Xestrong Dao Technique is a big step, and it is not good for himself.

The foundation is very important, and only by laying a good foundation can we improve quickly in the future.

Otherwise, like the ghost boy, he tried his best to create the ghost domain, and the result was that he created the ghost domain of the supreme Dao technique, but the control was very poor, and it belonged to the defective supreme Dao technique, and he could only create such a supreme Dao technique, and almost exhausted his aura.

Moreover, the ghost boy's other great Taoist skills are not high, so he belongs to the big step, although he has won fame, but it is not much good for himself.

The powerhouses of the Nine Extremes Legion and the Human Race, Ye Tian did not let them leave the Forbidden Void Realm, otherwise it would be easy to expose something.

After all, there must be something wrong with the Terran race becoming so powerful all of a sudden!

In the past, the development of the human race was at a normal speed, but now the speed has increased by a thousand times all of a sudden, which is abnormal.

Therefore, Ye Tian let them cultivate here, and they were very happy, after all, they could cultivate thousands of times faster than people from the outside world, and the energy contained in the Forbidden Void Realm was very suitable for cultivation, and occasionally they could find a forbidden strange thing.

Such a good place, let them leave, they are reluctant to leave.

--------------------

Heavenly Emperor Palace, Feng Family.

At this moment, the Feng family was in a gloomy cloud, everyone was very lonely, and they were in a very bad mood.

Before, the fall of the Fengyang Emperor, the status of the Feng family in the Heavenly Emperor Palace has decreased a lot, and 10,000 years ago, the Feng family's ancestor Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the Longfei Dao Ancestor, fell in the Forbidden Void Realm, which made the Feng family even worse.

Now, the strongest Dao Ancestor of the Feng family is only the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and his status in the Heavenly Army is not very high.

What's more, one of the emperors to whom the Feng family is loyal has given up on the Feng family.

Now, the high-level officials of the Heavenly Emperor Palace have made a decision, the Feng family has no potential, and they can't continue to stay in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The area of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is indeed very large, and it can accommodate a lot, but the Heavenly Emperor Palace is currently recruiting geniuses for the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, so it is developing rapidly, and many geniuses entering the Heavenly Emperor Palace need to occupy some areas as mansions, and the Feng family has no potential, but it occupies such a large area as a family residence.

Therefore, the Heavenly Emperor Palace wanted to expel the Feng family, let the Feng family enter an ancient continent under the command of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and hand over an ancient continent to them to manage.

In the words of the high-level officials of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the area occupied by the Feng family has expanded many times, and it is a reward to have such an ancient continent as the family residence.

But the Feng family himself knew very well what kind of reward this was? This was banishment!

Staying in the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, how good the cultivation environment is, and it is very safe, no force can invade the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, and the children of the family can occasionally enjoy the emperor's preaching, but if they are banished to the Ancient Continent, there is no benefit, and even intelligence news is difficult to receive in time.

Moreover, if there is an enemy to deal with the Feng family, the Heavenly Emperor Palace may not be able to rescue it in time.

What's more, if the children of the Feng family want to arrange to enter the Heavenly Emperor Palace to hold a good position in the future, it will be extremely difficult.

But the Feng family had no way to resist the decision of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, so they could only choose to evacuate the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

this day.

The countless clansmen of the Feng family packed up, left the Heavenly Emperor Palace on an ancient warship, and came to a primeval continent far away from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Luanfeng Continent.

Not long after the Feng family settled in the Luanfeng Continent, the intelligence officers of the Nine Extremes Legion collected this information and informed Ye Tian.

Terran.

"The Feng family was expelled from the Heavenly Emperor Palace and is currently settled in the Luanfeng Continent!"

Ye Tian smiled.

He didn't forget to destroy the Feng family, but the Feng family was under the protection of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, not to mention that he was a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, even if he was a Ninefold Heavenly Invincible Dao Ancestor, there was no way to destroy the Feng family.

But now that the Feng family has left the Heavenly Emperor Palace, there is no protection from the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

If he wants to destroy the Feng family, it is so easy!

Shout!

Ye Tian's figure disappeared, and he quickly left the human race and went to the Luanfeng Continent.

And the Feng family didn't know that their destruction was coming!
